```{r}
  mutate(label = region)

# build the map
map_historical_25 <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = land, fill = "lightgray", color = NA) +
  geom_sf(
    data = shown_sf,
    aes(fill = color_cat),   # <-- use color_cat instead of continent
    color = "grey20",
    size = 0.2,
    alpha = 0.4
  ) +
  geom_sf_text(
    data = pts,
    aes(label = label),
    size = 2.6,
    colour= "black"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values   = colors_map,
    na.value = "transparent",
    name     = "Event category"
  ) +
  coord_sf(
    xlim = c(-180, 178.125), ylim = c(-60, 90), expand = FALSE
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.margin     = margin(0,0,0,0),
    legend.position = "none",   # inside top-left
    legend.justification = c("left", "bottom"),
    legend.background = element_blank(),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

map_historical_25
```
### ModE-Sim multicentennial (1420-1999)

```{r}
get_record <- function(df){
  df |> 
    filter(year %in% 1444:1999) |> 
    filter(roll_mean == max(roll_mean)) |> 
    pull(roll_mean)
}

df_record25_era5_modesim_multicent <- df_modesim_25 |> 
  mutate(pcwd_max0 = purrr::map_dbl(data, ~get_record(.))) |> 
  dplyr::select(-data) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  group_by(region) |> 
  summarise(pcwd_max0_left = min(pcwd_max0), pcwd_max0_right = max(pcwd_max0)) |> 
  left_join(
    df_record25_era5 |> 
      dplyr::select(region, pcwd_max1),
    by = join_by(region)
  )
```

Plot.
```{r}
tmp <- df_record25_era5_modesim_multicent |> 
  mutate(
    is_greater = pcwd_max1 > pcwd_max0_right,
    color_cat = case_when(
      is_greater ~ "unprecedented",
      TRUE ~ "within"
    )
  )

# counts
n_greater <- sum(tmp$is_greater, na.rm = TRUE)

gg8 <- tmp |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = pcwd_max0_right, xend = pcwd_max0_left, y = pcwd_max1, color = color_cat)) +
  geom_segment(show.legend = FALSE, linewidth = 0.75) +
  geom_point(size = 0.75, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  coord_equal() +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Event category", values = c("within" = "#301934",
                                                "unprecedented"     = "#91C499")) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_log10() +
  scale_y_log10() +
    labs(
    x = "ModE-Sim 1420-1999 (mm)",
    y = "ERA5 2000-2024 (mm)",
    subtitle = bquote(italic(N[plain("unprecedented")]) == .(n_greater)),
    title = ""
  )+  theme(
    legend.position = c(0.05, 0.95),   # inside top-left
    legend.justification = c("left", "top"),
    legend.background = element_blank(),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

gg8
```
```{r}
# Join categories onto the spatial data
shown_sf <- refregions_sf %>% 
  inner_join(tmp %>% dplyr::select(region, color_cat), by = "region")

# centroids for labels
pts <- shown_sf %>% 
  st_centroid() %>% 
  mutate(label = region)

# build the map
map_multicent_25 <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = land, fill = "lightgray", color = NA) +
  geom_sf(
    data = shown_sf,
    aes(fill = color_cat),   # <-- use color_cat instead of continent
    color = "grey20",
    size = 0.2,
    alpha = 0.4
  ) +
  geom_sf_text(
    data = pts,
    aes(label = label),
    size = 2.6,
    colour= "black"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values   = colors_map,
    na.value = "transparent",
    name     = "Event category"
  ) +
  coord_sf(
    xlim = c(-180, 178.125), ylim = c(-60, 90), expand = FALSE
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.margin     = margin(0,0,0,0),
    legend.position = "none",   # inside top-left
    legend.justification = c("left", "bottom"),
    legend.background = element_blank(),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

map_multicent_25
```

## 30-year extremes (pooled)

Calculate rolling 30-year extremes of all data, separated by region (ModE-Sim also separated by ensemble member).
```{r}
# Function: fit Gumbel with extRemes and estimate given year return level
fit_gumbel_return <- function(vec, return_period = 30) {
  # Fit Gumbel (GEV with shape = 0)
  fit <- extRemes::fevd(vec, type = "Gumbel")
  
  # Estimate T-year return level
  rl <- unname(c(return.level(fit, return.period = return_period)))

  return(rl)
}

calc_30x <- function(df){
  fit_gumbel_return(df$pcwd)
}

calc_30x_across_members <- function(df){
  # Collapse selected columns into vector
  vec <- unlist(df %>% dplyr::select(-year))
  vec <- vec[is.finite(vec)]
  fit_gumbel_return(vec, return_period = 30)
}

## 25-year sliding windows
apply_sliding <- function(df){
  df %>%
    mutate(return_level = slide_index_dbl(
      seq_len(nrow(.)),
      .i = year,
      .before = 24,
      .complete = TRUE,
      .f = ~ calc_30x_across_members(df[.x, ])
    ))
}

apply_pooled <- function(df, years){
  df |> 
    filter(year %in% years) |> 
    calc_30x_across_members()
}

# fit two extreme value distributions on the two ERA5 periods and extract the 30-year extreme value.
df_era5_30x <- df_era5 |> 
  mutate(period = ifelse(year %in% 1975:1999, "pcwd_x30_ref0", ifelse(year %in% 2000:2024, "pcwd_x30_ref1", NA))) |> 
  group_by(region, period) |> 
  nest() |> 
  drop_na(period) |> 
  mutate(pcwd_30x = purrr::map_dbl(data, ~calc_30x(.))) |> 
  pivot_wider(id_cols = -data, values_from = "pcwd_30x", names_from = "period")

# this takes long to compute
nmembers <- length(unique(df_modesim$member))

# fit extreme value distributions on sliding windows of 25 years, gathering values from all ensemble members
# warning: this takes a few minutes
df_modesim_30x_sliding <- df_modesim |> 
  mutate(member = paste0("m", as.integer(member))) |> 
  pivot_wider(names_from = "member", values_from = "pcwd") |> 
  group_by(region) |> 
  nest() |> 
  mutate(data = map(data, apply_sliding)) |> 
  mutate(data = map(data, ~dplyr::select(., year, pcwd_30x = return_level))) |> 
  unnest(data)

# fit extreme value distributions on data pooled from all years in different periods
df_modesim_30x_pooled <- df_modesim |> 
  mutate(member = paste0("m", as.integer(member))) |> 
  pivot_wider(names_from = "member", values_from = "pcwd") |> 
  group_by(region) |> 
  nest()
  
df_modesim_30x_pooled_multicent <- df_modesim_30x_pooled |> 
  mutate(pcwd_30x = map_dbl(data, ~apply_pooled(., years = 1420:1999)))

df_modesim_30x_pooled_historical <- df_modesim_30x_pooled |> 
  mutate(pcwd_30x = map_dbl(data, ~apply_pooled(., years = 1850:1999)))

df_modesim_30x_pooled_recent <- df_modesim_30x_pooled |> 
  mutate(pcwd_30x = map_dbl(data, ~apply_pooled(., years = 1975:1999)))
```

### ERA5

```{r}
tmp <- df_era5_30x |> 
  mutate(is_greater = pcwd_x30_ref0 < pcwd_x30_ref1,
  color_cat = case_when(
      is_greater ~ "unprecedented",
      TRUE ~ "within"
    ))

n_greater <- tmp |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  summarise(n_greater = sum(is_greater)) |> 
  pull(n_greater)

gg9 <- tmp |> 
  ggplot(aes(pcwd_x30_ref0, pcwd_x30_ref1, color = color_cat)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.9, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  coord_equal() +
    scale_color_manual(name = "Event category", values = c("within" = "#301934",
                                                "unprecedented"     = "#91C499")) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_log10() +
  scale_y_log10() +
  labs(
    x = "ERA5 1975-1999 (mm)",
    y = "ERA5 2000-2024 (mm)",
    subtitle = bquote(italic(N[plain("unprecedented")]) == .(n_greater)),
    title = ""
  ) + theme(
    legend.position = c(0.05, 0.95),   # inside top-left
    legend.justification = c("left", "top"),
    legend.background = element_blank(),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"))

gg9
```

```{r}

colors_map <- c("within" = "#301934", 
                                "unprecedented"     = "#91C499")

# Join categories onto the spatial data
shown_sf <- refregions_sf %>% 
  inner_join(tmp %>% dplyr::select(region, color_cat), by = "region")

# centroids for labels
pts <- shown_sf %>% 
  st_centroid() %>% 
  mutate(label = region)

# build the map
map_modern_30yr <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = land, fill = "lightgray", color = NA) +
  geom_sf(
    data = shown_sf,
    aes(fill = color_cat),   # <-- use color_cat instead of continent
    color = "grey20",
    size = 0.2,
    alpha = 0.4
  ) +
  geom_sf_text(
    data = pts,
    aes(label = label),
    size = 2.6,
    colour= "black"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values   = colors_map,
    na.value = "transparent",
    name     = "Event category"
  ) +
  coord_sf(
    xlim = c(-180, 178.125), ylim = c(-60, 90), expand = FALSE
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.margin     = margin(0,0,0,0),
    legend.position = "none",   # inside top-left
    legend.justification = c("left", "bottom"),
    legend.background = element_blank(),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

map_modern_30yr
```


### ModE-Sim recent (1975-1999)

```{r}
get_minmax <- function(df){
  df |> 
    filter(year %in% 1975:1999) |> 
    ungroup() |> 
    summarise(pcwd_30x_ref0_max = max(pcwd_30x, na.rm = TRUE), pcwd_30x_ref0_min = min(pcwd_30x, na.rm = TRUE))
}

df_30x_sliding_recent <- df_modesim_30x_sliding |> 
  group_by(region) |> 
  nest() |> 
  mutate(data = purrr::map(data, ~get_minmax(.))) |> 
  unnest(data) |> 
  left_join(
    df_era5_30x |> 
      dplyr::select(region, pcwd_x30_ref1),
    by = join_by(region)
  )
```

```{r}
tmp <- df_30x_sliding_recent |> 
  mutate(is_greater = pcwd_x30_ref1 > pcwd_30x_ref0_max,
  color_cat = case_when(
      is_greater ~ "unprecedented",
      TRUE ~ "within"
    ))

n_greater <- tmp |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  summarise(n_greater = sum(is_greater)) |> 
  pull(n_greater)

gg10 <- tmp |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = pcwd_30x_ref0_max, xend = pcwd_30x_ref0_min, y = pcwd_x30_ref1, color = color_cat)) +
  geom_segment(show.legend = FALSE, linewidth = 0.75) +
  geom_point(show.legend = FALSE, size = 0.75) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  coord_equal() +
    scale_color_manual(name = "Event category", values = c("within" = "#301934",
                                                "unprecedented"     = "#91C499")) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_log10() +
  scale_y_log10() +
  labs(
    x = "ModE-Sim 1975-1999 (mm)",
    y = "ERA5 2000-2024 (mm)",
    subtitle = bquote(italic(N[plain("unprecedented")]) == .(n_greater)),
    title = "   "
  )

gg10
```

```{r}

colors_map <- c("within" = "#301934", 
                                "unprecedented"     = "#91C499")

# Join categories onto the spatial data
shown_sf <- refregions_sf %>% 
  inner_join(tmp %>% dplyr::select(region, color_cat), by = "region")

# centroids for labels
pts <- shown_sf %>% 
  st_centroid() %>% 
  mutate(label = region)

# build the map
map_recent_30yr <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = land, fill = "lightgray", color = NA) +
  geom_sf(
    data = shown_sf,
    aes(fill = color_cat),   # <-- use color_cat instead of continent
    color = "grey20",
    size = 0.2,
    alpha = 0.4
  ) +
  geom_sf_text(
    data = pts,
    aes(label = label),
    size = 2.6,
    colour= "black"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values   = colors_map,
    na.value = "transparent",
    name     = "Event category"
  ) +
  coord_sf(
    xlim = c(-180, 178.125), ylim = c(-60, 90), expand = FALSE
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.margin     = margin(0,0,0,0),
    legend.position = "none",   # inside top-left
    legend.justification = c("left", "bottom"),
    legend.background = element_blank(),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

map_recent_30yr
```


### ModE-Sim historical (1850-1999)

```{r}
get_minmax <- function(df){
  df |> 
    filter(year %in% 1850:1999) |> 
    ungroup() |> 
    summarise(pcwd_30x_ref0_max = max(pcwd_30x, na.rm = TRUE), pcwd_30x_ref0_min = min(pcwd_30x, na.rm = TRUE))
}

df_30x_sliding_historical <- df_modesim_30x_sliding |> 
  group_by(region) |> 
  nest() |> 
  mutate(data = purrr::map(data, ~get_minmax(.))) |> 
  unnest(data) |> 
  left_join(
    df_era5_30x |> 
      dplyr::select(region, pcwd_x30_ref1),
    by = join_by(region)
  )
```

```{r}
tmp <- df_30x_sliding_historical |> 
  mutate(is_greater = pcwd_x30_ref1 > pcwd_30x_ref0_max,
  color_cat = case_when(
      is_greater ~ "unprecedented",
      TRUE ~ "within"
    ))

n_greater <- tmp |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  summarise(n_greater = sum(is_greater)) |> 
  pull(n_greater)

gg11 <- tmp |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = pcwd_30x_ref0_max, xend = pcwd_30x_ref0_min, y = pcwd_x30_ref1, color = color_cat)) +
  geom_segment(show.legend = FALSE, linewidth = 0.75) +
  geom_point(show.legend = FALSE, size = 0.75) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  coord_equal() +
    scale_color_manual(name = "Event category", values = c("within" = "#301934",
                                                "unprecedented"     = "#91C499")) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_log10() +
  scale_y_log10() +
  labs(
    x = "ModE-Sim 1850-1999 (mm)",
    y = "ERA5 2000-2024 (mm)",
    subtitle = bquote(italic(N[plain("unprecedented")]) == .(n_greater)),
    title = "   "
  )

gg11
```

```{r}

colors_map <- c("within" = "#301934", 
                                "unprecedented"     = "#91C499")

# Join categories onto the spatial data
shown_sf <- refregions_sf %>% 
  inner_join(tmp %>% dplyr::select(region, color_cat), by = "region")

# centroids for labels
pts <- shown_sf %>% 
  st_centroid() %>% 
  mutate(label = region)

# build the map
map_historic_30yr <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = land, fill = "lightgray", color = NA) +
  geom_sf(
    data = shown_sf,
    aes(fill = color_cat),   # <-- use color_cat instead of continent
    color = "grey20",
    size = 0.2,
    alpha = 0.4
  ) +
  geom_sf_text(
    data = pts,
    aes(label = label),
    size = 2.6,
    colour= "black"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values   = colors_map,
    na.value = "transparent",
    name     = "Event category"
  ) +
  coord_sf(
    xlim = c(-180, 178.125), ylim = c(-60, 90), expand = FALSE
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.margin     = margin(0,0,0,0),
    legend.position = "none",   # inside top-left
    legend.justification = c("left", "bottom"),
    legend.background = element_blank(),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

map_historic_30yr
```

### ModE-Sim multi-century (1420-1999)

```{r}
get_minmax <- function(df){
  df |> 
    filter(year %in% 1420:1999) |> 
    ungroup() |> 
    summarise(pcwd_30x_ref0_max = max(pcwd_30x, na.rm = TRUE), pcwd_30x_ref0_min = min(pcwd_30x, na.rm = TRUE))
}

df_30x_sliding_multicent <- df_modesim_30x_sliding |> 
  group_by(region) |> 
  nest() |> 
  mutate(data = purrr::map(data, ~get_minmax(.))) |> 
  unnest(data) |> 
  left_join(
    df_era5_30x |> 
      dplyr::select(region, pcwd_x30_ref1),
    by = join_by(region)
  )
```

```{r}
tmp <- df_30x_sliding_multicent |> 
  mutate(is_greater = pcwd_x30_ref1 > pcwd_30x_ref0_max,
  color_cat = case_when(
      is_greater ~ "unprecedented",
      TRUE ~ "within"
    ))

n_greater <- tmp |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  summarise(n_greater = sum(is_greater)) |> 
  pull(n_greater)

gg12 <- tmp |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = pcwd_30x_ref0_max, xend = pcwd_30x_ref0_min, y = pcwd_x30_ref1, color = color_cat)) +
  geom_segment(show.legend = FALSE, linewidth = 0.75) +
  geom_point(show.legend = FALSE, size = 0.75) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  coord_equal() +
    scale_color_manual(name = "Event category", values = c("within" = "#301934",
                                                "unprecedented"     = "#91C499")) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_log10() +
  scale_y_log10() +
  labs(
    x = "ModE-Sim 1420-1999 (mm)",
    y = "ERA5 2000-2024 (mm)",
    subtitle = bquote(italic(N[plain("unprecedented")]) == .(n_greater)),
    title = "   "
  )

gg12
```
```{r}

colors_map <- c("within" = "#301934", 
                                "unprecedented"     = "#91C499")

# Join categories onto the spatial data
shown_sf <- refregions_sf %>% 
  inner_join(tmp %>% dplyr::select(region, color_cat), by = "region")

# centroids for labels
pts <- shown_sf %>% 
  st_centroid() %>% 
  mutate(label = region)

# build the map
map_multicent_30yr <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = land, fill = "lightgray", color = NA) +
  geom_sf(
    data = shown_sf,
    aes(fill = color_cat),   # <-- use color_cat instead of continent
    color = "grey20",
    size = 0.2,
    alpha = 0.4
  ) +
  geom_sf_text(
    data = pts,
    aes(label = label),
    size = 2.6,
    colour= "black"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values   = colors_map,
    na.value = "transparent",
    name     = "Event category"
  ) +
  coord_sf(
    xlim = c(-180, 178.125), ylim = c(-60, 90), expand = FALSE
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.margin     = margin(0,0,0,0),
    legend.position = "none",   # inside top-left
    legend.justification = c("left", "bottom"),
    legend.background = element_blank(),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

map_multicent_30yr
```


```{r}
#map_recent <- map_recent + theme(plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0))
col1 <- plot_grid(
  gg1, gg2, gg3, gg4, 
  ncol = 1,
  nrow =4,
  rel_widths = c(1,1, 1,1), # map takes smaller horizontal space
  align = "v",
    labels = c(
    "a) Record annual PCWD", "b)", "c)", "d)"),
    # Push labels all the way to the left margin of each panel
  label_x = 0.02,   # 0 = extreme left edge, a little bit of padding
  hjust   = 0,      # left‑justify the label text
  # Tweak vertical positioning if you like
  label_y = 0.975,   # just below the top
  vjust   = 1,       # align text at its top
  expand      = TRUE 
)

col2 <- plot_grid(
  gg5, gg6, gg7, gg8, 
  ncol = 1,
  nrow =4,
  rel_widths = c(1,1,1, 1), # map takes smaller horizontal space
  align = "v",
    labels = c("e) Record 25-year mean PCWD", "f)", "g)", "h)"),
    # Push labels all the way to the left margin of each panel
  label_x = 0.02,   # 0 = extreme left edge, a little bit of padding
  hjust   = 0,      # left‑justify the label text
  # Tweak vertical positioning if you like
  label_y = 0.975,   # just below the top
  vjust   = 1,       # align text at its top
  expand      = TRUE 
  )

col3 <- plot_grid(
  gg9, gg10,  gg11, gg12,
  ncol = 1,
  nrow =4,
  rel_widths = c(1,1,1, 1), # map takes smaller horizontal space
  align = "v",
  labels = c("i) 30-year extreme PCWD", "j)", "k)", "l)"),
    # Push labels all the way to the left margin of each panel
  label_x = 0.02,   # 0 = extreme left edge, a little bit of padding
  hjust   = 0,      # left‑justify the label text
  # Tweak vertical positioning if you like
  label_y = 0.975,   # just below the top
  vjust   = 1,       # align text at its top
  expand      = TRUE 
  )
```

## All combined plot

```{r}
gg_combined <- cowplot::plot_grid(
  col1, col2, col3, 
  ncol=3
  )
ggsave(here("figures/combined_record_pcwd.pdf"), plot = gg_combined, width = 12, height = 15)
```

## Combine all maps 

```{r}
map_recent <- map_recent + theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 0, r = 10, b = 0, l = 0))
map_mode_recent <- map_mode_recent + theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 0, r = 10, b = 0, l = 0))
map_historical <- map_historical + theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 0, r = 10, b = 0, l = 0))
map_multicen <- map_multicen + theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 0, r = 10, b = 0, l = 0))

map_modern_25 <- map_modern_25 + theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 0, r = 10, b = 0, l = 0))
map_recent_25 <- map_recent_25 + theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 0, r = 10, b = 0, l = 0))
map_historical_25 <- map_historical_25 + theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 0, r = 10, b = 0, l = 0))
map_multicent_25 <- map_multicent_25 + theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 0, r = 10, b = 0, l = 0))

row1 <- plot_grid(
  map_recent, map_mode_recent, map_historical, map_multicen, 
  ncol = 1,
  nrow =4,
  rel_widths = c(1,1, 1,1), # map takes smaller horizontal space
  align = "v",
    labels = c(
    "a) Record annual PCWD mapped", "b)", "c)", "d)"),
    # Push labels all the way to the left margin of each panel
  label_x = 0.02,   # 0 = extreme left edge, a little bit of padding
  hjust   = 0,      # left‑justify the label text
  # Tweak vertical positioning if you like
  label_y = 0.975,   # just below the top
  vjust   = 1,       # align text at its top
  expand      = TRUE 
)

row2 <- plot_grid(
  map_modern_25, map_recent_25, map_historical_25, map_multicent_25, 
  ncol = 1,
  nrow =4,
  rel_widths = c(1,1,1, 1), # map takes smaller horizontal space
  align = "v",
    labels = c("e) Record 25-year mean PCWD mapped", "f)", "g)", "h)"),
    # Push labels all the way to the left margin of each panel
  label_x = 0.02,   # 0 = extreme left edge, a little bit of padding
  hjust   = 0,      # left‑justify the label text
  # Tweak vertical positioning if you like
  label_y = 0.975,   # just below the top
  vjust   = 1,       # align text at its top
  expand      = TRUE 
  )

row3 <- plot_grid(
  map_modern_30yr, map_recent_30yr,  map_historic_30yr, map_multicent_30yr,
  ncol = 1,
  nrow =4,
  rel_widths = c(1,1,1, 1), # map takes smaller horizontal space
  align = "v",
  labels = c("i) 30-year extreme PCWD", "j)", "k)", "l)"),
    # Push labels all the way to the left margin of each panel
  label_x = 0.02,   # 0 = extreme left edge, a little bit of padding
  hjust   = 0,      # left‑justify the label text
  # Tweak vertical positioning if you like
  label_y = 0.975,   # just below the top
  vjust   = 1,       # align text at its top
  expand      = TRUE 
  )
```

```{r}
gg_combined_maps <- cowplot::plot_grid(
  row1, row2, row3, 
  nrow=1, ncol=3
  )

ggsave(here("figures/combined_record_pcwd_maps.pdf"), plot = gg_combined_maps, width = 15, height = 12)
```
